message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
  LifeLineBorderColor #CCCCCC
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
  ParticipantBorderColor #CCCCCC
  ArrowColor #333333
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
  NoteBorderColor #CCCCCC
}

actor "sidetree-core-go" as Actor
participant "Instance 1" as Instance1
participant "orb.operation" as OrbOperation
database "op-queue DB" as DB
participant "Instance 2" as Instance2

== Initialization ==
Actor -> Instance1: Add(op1)
activate Instance1
Instance1 -> OrbOperation: Publish(op1)
activate OrbOperation
OrbOperation --> Instance1: ok
deactivate OrbOperation
Instance1 --> Actor: ok
deactivate Instance1

Actor -> Instance2: Add(op2)
activate Instance2
Instance2 -> OrbOperation: Publish(op2)
activate OrbOperation
OrbOperation --> Instance2: ok
deactivate OrbOperation
Instance2 --> Actor: ok
deactivate Instance2

== Processing op2 ==
OrbOperation -> Instance1: op2
activate Instance1
Instance1 --> OrbOperation: ok
Instance1 -> DB: Put(op2,handler1ID,expiry)
activate DB
DB --> Instance1: ok
deactivate DB
Instance1 -> OrbOperation: Ack(op2)
activate OrbOperation
OrbOperation --> Instance1: ok
deactivate OrbOperation
deactivate Instance1

== Processing op1 ==
OrbOperation -> Instance2: op1
activate Instance2
Instance2 --> OrbOperation: ok
Instance2 -> DB: Put(op1,handler2ID,expiry)
activate DB
DB --> Instance2: ok
deactivate DB
Instance2 -> OrbOperation: Ack(op1)
activate OrbOperation
OrbOperation --> Instance2: ok
deactivate OrbOperation
deactivate Instance2

@enduml
